headline: What A Second Trump Presidency Would Mean For Elon Musk And His Many Ventures
summary: The future of Elon Musk's business endeavors, including Tesla, SpaceX, and X (formerly Twitter), could rest on the outcome of the 2024 presidential election.

headline: Don't Look Now, But Zuckerberg's Threads Is Picking Up Steam
summary: Instagram spinoff Threads is experiencing a surge in active users and web traffic one year after its inception.

summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week. Here’s a look at some of our top stories.

summary: EV earnings got started off with a not-so-positive report from market leader Tesla, and Lucid struck a battery supply deal.

headline: Nancy Pelosi Vs. Kamala Harris: Poll Shows Who People Think Is the Better Investor
summary: A Benzinga poll asked readers if Nancy Pelosi (and her husband) had the better investment style than Kamala Harris (and her husband).

headline: Steve Jobs Once Consulted Bernard Arnault When Apple Was Opening Its First Retail Store: French Luxury Tycoon Says 'It Proved To Be A Fantastic Success. When At The Time Many Of His Competitors…Saying It Would Never Work.'
summary: French luxury mogul Bernard Arnault revealed that the late Steve Jobs sought his advice on Apple's retail strategy, leading to the successful launch of Apple's first store despite industry skepticism.

headline: Top Analyst Says OpenAI's AI-Powered Search Engine Likely Isn't A Threat To Google: 'It's Hard To See Why SearchGPT Is 10X Better…'
summary: Gene Munster and Doug Clinton of Deepwater Asset Management have downplayed concerns about OpenAI's SearchGPT overtaking Google Search, suggesting the new AI search tool does not pose a significant threat based on its current capabilities.

headline: Google Cuts Ties With Amazon-Owned One Medical, But Clarifies It Is Not Due To E-Commerce Giant's $3.9B Acquisition
summary: Google has severed its business ties with One Medical, a primary healthcare provider acquired by Amazon for $3.9 billion.
